message:
feat(conformance): Add TestRunner and logging infrastructure

Implement core testing framework components:

runner.rs:
- TestRunner: Execute tests against a runtime with filtering by
  category, tags, and test IDs
- RunConfig: Configuration for test execution (timeout, fail-fast)
- RunSummary: Results summary with pass/fail counts
- ComparisonResult/Status: Compare test outcomes between two runtimes
- run_comparison(): Run same tests on two runtimes and compare results

logging.rs:
- LogCollector: Thread-safe log capture during test execution
- LogEntry: Structured log entries with level, message, target, timestamp
- LogConfig: Output formatting configuration
- format_entry(): Format log entries for display

lib.rs:
- Export new modules and types
- Add PartialEq derive to Checkpoint for comparison

Closes asupersync-ocj3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
